metadata.description: The Dataverse Instance to connect to within a Flow when using Web API Calls

text.description: A list of Calculation Positions to be created
text.title: Calculation Positions Payload

text_1.description: Create Calculation Positions as Copy or as Import from Template
text_1.title: Operation Type

text_2.description: The GUID of the Calculation where the Positions are added to
text_2.title: Calculation

inputs.name: varNumberOfPositions_Processed
inputs.value: @length(body('Filter_Calculation_Details_by_Element_Type'))

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - @{length(body('Filter_Calculation_Details_by_Element_Type'))} Calculation Positions created. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

Filter_Positions_by_Project_Product_[wit.description: Get all Positions of Type 'Project Product' where no BOM is assigned. Project Product Positions with BOM are processed separately because both the Project Product GUID and the BOM Project Product GUID must be replaced.

inputs.name: varCalculationDetails_Payload
inputs.value: @outputs('Positions_with_replaced_Project_Product_GUIDs')

Filter_Positions_by_BOM_Project_Product.description: Get all Positions where a BOM Project Product is assigned. Exclude Positions from Type 'Project Product' - these Positions are processed separately because both the Project Product GUID and the BOM Project Product GUID must be replaced.

Filter_Positions_by_Project_Product_[wit.description: Get all Positions of Type 'Project Product' where a BOM Project Product is assigned. Both the Project Product GUID and the BOM Project Product GUID must be replaced.

inputs.name: varCalculationDetails_Payload
inputs.value: @outputs('Positions_with_replaced_BOM_Project_Product_GUIDs')

inputs.name: varCalculationDetails_Payload
inputs.value: @outputs('Replace_Project_Product_and_BOM_Project_Product_GUID')

Remove_Project_Products_from_Positions.description: Remove all Positions of Type 'Project Product' - these Positions are already added to the Payload in the previous step

Remove_BOM_Project_Products_from_Positio.description: Remove all Positions where a BOM Project Product is assigned - these Positions are already added to the Payload in the previous step

inputs.name: varCalculationDetails_Payload
inputs.value: @outputs('Positions_without_Project_Products')

inputs.name: varCalculationDetails_Payload
inputs.value: @body('Parse_JSON')

Set_varCalculationDetails_Payload.description: Add all Positions to Payload without replacing any Project Product GUID.

Filter_Calculation_Details_by_Element_Ty.description: Only process positions that are not Bill of Materials. These positions are already created in the previous step.

select.hso_calculationdetail_parentid@odata.bin:
@If(
	equals(
        item()?['hso_level'],
        1
    ), 
	'',
	concat(
		'hso_calculationdetails(_hso_calculationid_value=', 
		item()?['_hso_calculationid_value'],
		',hso_linenumber=',
        concat(
			'''', 
			item()?['hso_parent_linenumber_import'], 
			''''
		),
		')'
	)
)

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - Process @{length(body('Filter_Payload_by_Level'))} Level-@{variables('varIterationLevel')} Items with @{outputs('Calculate_Parallelism')} Batch(es) (Batch Size: @{outputs('Calculate_Batch_Size')}). @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - @{length(body('Filter_Calculation_Details_by_BOM'))} Bill of Materials Project Products to process. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - @{length(body('Filter_Calculation_Details_by_BOM'))} Bill of Materials Project Products processed. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - @{length(body('Filter_Calculation_Details_by_Project_Product'))} Project Products to process. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - @{length(body('Filter_Calculation_Details_by_Project_Product'))} Project Products processed. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

Project_Products.description: Check whether Project Products need to be created

select.Message: @coalesce(item()?['outputs']?['body']?['error']?['message'], item()?['outputs']?['body']?['message'], item()?['error']?['message'], 'No Message found. Please check Flow-Run.')

inputs.name: varError
inputs.value: @items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary_[Calculation_Positions]')

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [ERR] - [@{utcNow()}] - Error when creating Calculation Positions. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - Respond with Success to Navigation App and proceed with subsequent Tasks. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varErrorMessage
inputs.value: [ERROR] - Action '@{items('Apply_to_each_Error_[App_Response]')?['Action']}' failed with error message: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_[App_Response]')?['Message']} (Status: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_[App_Response]')?['Status']} / Status Code: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_[App_Response]')?['StatusCode']})

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value:
[INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - Respond with Failure to Navigation App and proceed with subsequent Tasks.
Error Message: @{variables('varErrorMessage')} @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varNumberOfPositions_DefaultValues_Processed
inputs.value: @variables('varNumberOfPositions_DefaultValues_ToProcess')

inputs.name: varLog
varLog
varLog
varLog
varNumberOfPositions_DefaultValues_ToProcess

select.Message: @coalesce(item()?['outputs']?['body']?['error']?['message'], item()?['outputs']?['body']?['message'], item()?['error']?['message'], 'No Message found. Please check Flow-Run.')

inputs.name: varError
inputs.value: @items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary_[Default_Values]')

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [ERR] - [@{utcNow()}] - Error when initiating function to re-calculate Positions or set Default Values for Positions. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [SUC] - [@{utcNow()}] - Flow run was successful. All required Parameters have been added to the Calculation.

inputs.name: varErrorMessage
inputs.value: @{null}

inputs.name: varErrorMessage
inputs.value: [ERROR] - Action '@{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Action']}' failed with error message: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Message']} (Status: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Status']} / Status Code: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['StatusCode']})

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [ERR] - [@{utcNow()}] - Flow run has failed. Parameters may have been partially added to Calculation. Check Log for further details.

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - The language of the Calculation is different to the default language. Start Child Flow to update Position Textblocks in required language. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - Start Child Flow to add Notes to created Calculation Positions (if required). @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - Processing Status for @{length(body('Select_Payload_for_Update'))} Calculation Positions updated. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - Update Processing Status for @{length(body('Select_Payload_for_Update'))} new Calculation Positions to check Parents Processing Status. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

Update_Calculation_Position_Processing_S.description: After creating new Calculation Positions the Processing Status must be updated to ensure that the Plug-In to eventually update the Parents Processing Status is executed. An additional Dataverse Update is necessary because of BypassCustomPlugInExecution.
